changes.summary: Newly registered resource for organization-level conversation settings.
Provider-side validation no longer restricts threshold values to the range 0–1000000.
Provider-side validation no longer restricts threshold values to the range 0–1000000.

For internal (rds) DNC lists, refresh reads phone entries from the API via export and updates state; when API data matches configured entries (ignoring list order), existing configuration ordering is kept to avoid unnecessary plan changes.
For internal (rds) DNC lists, entries are replaced only when the entries attribute changes; existing phone entries are deleted before re-uploading configured entries.
Phone entries are removed from the list before the DNC list itself is deleted.
Exported resource block labels use user email or name plus authority name instead of the compound resource identifier.
Export resolves name to domain_id through the corresponding data source when generating configuration.
Label references in exported configuration now match on the original label name, fixing resolution for labels whose names contain spaces.
Export dependency resolution may include a more complete set of nested flow dependencies in generated depends_on metadata.
